intended_use_full: Us2.v1 is a software platform that automatically processes, analyses and makes measurements on acquired transthoracic cardiac ultrasound images, producing a full report with measurements of several key cardiac structural and functional parameters. The data produced by this software is intended to be used to support qualified cardiologists or licensed primary care providers for clinical decision-making based on DICOM images produced by FDA approved ultrasound devices.
target_condition: Cardiac function assessment, including heart failure with reduced ejection fraction
ground_truth: Reference standard echocardiographic human measurements made in triplicate by the Cardiovascular Imaging Core Laboratory at Brigham and Women's Hospital
other_metrics: Individual Equivalence Coefficient (IEC) with 95% confidence intervals all fell below pre-specified non-inferiority margin of 0.25; device demonstrated interchangeability with reference standard echocardiographic human measurements made in triplicate by Cardiovascular Imaging Core Laboratory at Brigham and Women's Hospital
